title: Bitmine announces $74M Ether buys as chair says ‘greater chances of Clarity Act passage’
summary: Bitmine's big buy contrasts with crypto treasury peer Strategy, which reported selling millions of dollars worth of its Bitcoin holdings on Monday.

title: UN agency moves Stellar blockchain payment initiative beyond pilot stage
summary: The UN Development Programme said blockchain payment pilots in five countries cut costs, improved resilience and will now inform wider use across its humanitarian and development programs.

title: Ondas to Buy Military Drone Maker DZYNE for $875.8 Million
summary: Ondas Inc. agreed to buy autonomous aircraft maker DZYNE Technologies in an $875.8 million cash-and stock-deal that positions Ondas as a full-service autonomous defense technology platform.

title: Memory Chipmaker SK Hynix Kicks Off $28 Billion US Listing
summary:
SK Hynix kicked off the formal marketing process for its US listing on Monday, as the South Korean chipmaker looks to capitalize on surging investor demand for the high-flying memory-chip sector.

title: USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
After years of development, UTEXO—backed by Tether—rolls out Bitcoin-native USDT with client-side validation, slashing fees and middlemen compared to Tron or Ethereum rails.

title: President Trump Signals Openness to Bitcoin in Trump Accounts, Calls Himself ‘a Big Fan of Crypto’
summary:

President Trump said Bitcoin could eventually be included in the new Trump Accounts savings program, calling himself "a big fan of crypto."

title: Bitcoin Mining Stocks Jump After TeraWulf Signs $19 Billion Lease With Anthropic
summary: TeraWulf's 20-year lease deal with Anthropic is expected to generate $19 billion in revenue—and major Bitcoin mining stocks are surging.

title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Adds $73 Million in Ethereum While Strategy Dumps Bitcoin
summary: BitMine continued its relentless accumulation of Ethereum while Bitcoin's biggest treasury firm parted ways with more of its holdings.

title: Vitalik Buterin proposes ‘Extremely Lean’ Ethereum, shrinking the chain to near-zero state with ZK proofs
summary: Buterin outlined a two-step plan to shift Ethereum's state management to validators and replace per-epoch balance updates with ZK proofs.

title: AVAX One launches CEO search after leader of its Avalanche treasury pivot steps down
summary: SkyBridge founder Anthony Scaramucci backed AVAX One's $550 million Avalanche treasury strategy announced last year.

title: Zelenskyy says ‘battle in the sky’ will decide outcome of war with Russia
summary: Ukrainian leader says Donald Trump has changed his mind about the conflict

title: Nato backs Ukraine’s push to hit Russia harder, says Finnish president
summary: Alexander Stubb tells FT that long-range drone strikes have changed US views on the war and put Kyiv in ‘best’ position since 2022
